feat.name: Storming Gaze
feat.text:
You can open or energize a notable third eye on your forehead to strike with storming power. You deal 3d4 electricity or sonic damage in a 15-foot cone; Storming Gaze gains this trait. Each creature in the area must attempt a basic Reflex saving throw against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. You can't use this ability again for 1d4 rounds.  
  
At 7th level and every 2 levels thereafter, the damage increases by 1d4.

traits.name: Hungerseed
traits.text: A name for those who have oni ancestry.

traits.name: Primal
traits.text:
This magic comes from the primal tradition, connecting to the natural world and instinct. Anything with this trait is magical.  
  
A creature with this trait is primarily constituted of or has a strong connection to primal magic.
